title: MCKINNEY-VENTO HOMELESS EDUCATION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION MCKINNEY-VENTO HOMELESS EDUCATION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps by connecting students to community resources and minimizes school disruptions. This help can include enrolling in school without documents or transportation to and from school. 255 Capitol Street NE Salem, OR 97310 Eligibility: Students who are at risk of becoming homeless or are currently homeless. This includes students who: -Not in the physical custody of a parent or guardiann (unaccompanied minors) -Lack of a fixed, regular, nighttime, adequate place of residence -Stay in shelters, motels, or campgrounds because they have nowhere else to go -Live in cars, parks, abandoned buildings, or bus/train stations -Doubled up with other people due to loss of housing or economic hardship Hours: Varies by school district Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website and click on the "McKinney-Vento District Liaison Contact List" form to locate the liaison assigned to a child's school district FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Homeless School Transition Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - OFFICE OF CIVIL RIGHTS EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - OREGON SCHOOL DIRECTORY EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - TEEN PARENT SUCCESS PROGRAM FOOD - CHILD AND ADULT CARE FOOD PROGRAM FOOD - OREGON STATE SUMMER FOOD SERVICE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION
